changes: Match score now leads with a Strong/Partial/Needs work verdict instead of the raw number — verified live to stay consistent across AI providers even when the exact score differs a little between models

Fixed AI providers marking a skill as missing just because the resume and posting wrote it differently (e.g. JMeter vs Jmeter, SQA vs Software QA) — now recognized as a match, with the wording difference flagged as its own ATS note
Fixed matching/missing skill chips occasionally filling up with whole requirement sentences instead of short skill names (mostly on Mistral and Cohere)
Removed Cohere's smallest fallback model, which could return an empty analysis (no ATS notes or suggestions) instead of a useful one
Fixed the highlighted keywords in ATS notes and suggestions being hard to see in dark mode
Hugging Face added as a new AI provider (GPT-OSS 120B, GLM-5.2, and four Qwen3 models), with its own "Get an API key" link and real-time model availability check
Fixed AI providers occasionally inventing ATS notes about skills/technologies that aren't actually in your resume
More consistent, richer ATS notes and suggestions from fast/lite models (Cohere especially), and a crash fixed where an unlisted salary could drop an entire analysis
Redesigned the Provider and Model dropdowns on the Setup page with proper hover/selected states, keyboard navigation, and smoother animation
4 new free-tier AI providers added: Groq, Cerebras, Mistral, and Cohere
Save multiple custom model IDs per provider, not just one
Setup page now checks model availability in real time and flags retired models
Setup page now shows a "What's new" changelog when an update is available
Each AI provider's API key field now links straight to where you create that key
Smoother, more consistent layout on phones and tablets
Results page now shows the experience level a posting asks for
Job benefits and perks (insurance, bonuses, leave, etc.) are now extracted and shown
More reliable analysis from fast/lite AI models
More consistent match scores between re-analyzing the same resume and posting
More accurate job details when analyzing LinkedIn postings
Sharper, more specific ATS notes and analysis suggestions
Added OpenRouter as a free AI provider option
Faster analysis overall
